input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #6309 [Automation] java run fails for net.bytebuddy:byte-buddy-agent:1.11.17; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that mock the attachment provider must account for ByteBuddyAgent.install returning instrumentation after attachment; a mocked VM that does not initialize Installer can fail with 'agent is not initialized or unavailable'. This is a test-design issue, not external setup.
Future JDKs may restrict dynamic agent loading more strongly; current JDK behavior emits warnings but does not require additional setup for basic JVM test coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is concretely required: byte-buddy-agent is normally used directly via its own artifact and self-attachment works on a JDK with the built-in jdk.attach module; optional emulated-attach dependencies are only fallback paths, not required for meaningful TCK coverage.
